title: Neuro Resilience Module™
tagline: Cognitive aging support and neuroprotective nutrition
purpose: A targeted module formulation designed to support normal cognitive function, healthy neuroinflammatory balance, and neuroprotective signaling pathways. Rooted in classical Islamic pharmacopoeial literature on cognitive botanicals, synthesized with contemporary neuroscience research.
supports: Normal cognitive function and mental clarity
Healthy acetylcholine metabolism and neuronal membrane integrity
Normal mood balance and stress adaptive response

dosing.note: Optional; with lunch for sustained support

safetyNotes: Consult a qualified healthcare practitioner before use if pregnant, nursing, or managing any neurological condition.
Vinpocetine should not be used by individuals on anticoagulant or antiplatelet therapy without medical supervision.
Not recommended for use in children or adolescents.
Keep out of reach of children.
suitedFor: Adults seeking to support normal cognitive resilience and mental clarity
Individuals interested in evidence-informed neuroprotective nutrition
Those following a structured wellness program who wish to add targeted cognitive support
systemRole: This is a Module formulation intended to be layered upon the three Core formulations. It is not a standalone protocol and is best used under the guidance of a qualified practitioner familiar with the HTP System.
